introSection: Cumbres was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Spanish manufacturer Robles Bouso Atracciones previously located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.
fullText: Cumbres was a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Spanish manufacturer Robles Bouso Atracciones previously located at Parque de Atracciones de Madrid in Madrid, Madrid, Community of Madrid, Spain.
